psalm-70-1.verse: O God, hasten to deliver me; O Lord, hasten to my help!
psalm-70-1.prayer: Lord, come quickly to help me when I am in need. Teach me to call on You first and trust Your timing.

psalm-70-2.verse: Let those be ashamed and humiliated Who seek my life; Let those be turned back and dishonored Who delight in my hurt.
psalm-70-2.prayer: Father, protect me from anything that seeks to harm my soul, weaken my faith, or pull me away from Your truth.

psalm-70-3.verse: Let those be turned back because of their shame Who say, “Aha, aha!”
psalm-70-3.prayer: Lord, turn back every voice of shame, fear, and discouragement. Help me listen instead to Your truth and love.

psalm-70-4.verse: Let all who seek You rejoice and be glad in You; And let those who love Your salvation say continually, “Let God be magnified.”
psalm-70-4.prayer: Father, let all who seek You rejoice and be glad in You. Fill my heart with joy in Your salvation and love.

psalm-70-5.verse: But I am afflicted and needy; Hasten to me, O God! You are my help and my deliverer; O Lord, do not delay.
psalm-70-5.prayer: Lord, I am needy and dependent on You. You are my help and my deliverer, so please do not delay in strengthening and guiding me.

psalm-70-closing.verse:
Lord, thank You for being my help, my deliverer, and my source of salvation. When I feel weak, rushed, afraid, or overwhelmed, help me seek You with confidence. Protect me from discouragement, fill me with joy in Your presence, and remind me that You are near to all who call upon You.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
psalm-70-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for being my help, my deliverer, and my source of salvation. When I feel weak, rushed, afraid, or overwhelmed, help me seek You with confidence. Protect me from discouragement, fill me with joy in Your presence, and remind me that You are near to all who call upon You.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
